titleStmt.title: SII 18.38: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 38. (B.K. No. 37 of 1934-35.) KADARMAṆḌALIGI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Broken stone in the field of Vālikāra Rāmanāyaka.

summary.p: This record, engraved in characters of 9-10th century is dated in the cyclic year Sarvajit. Further details of the date are lost. Since it refers to a reigning king and since at that time there was no other ruling family in this region except that of the Rāshṭrakūṭas, it is possible that the record belongs to the reign of a Rāshṭrakuṭa king. The year Sarvajit occurs thrice (in A.D. 807, 867 and 927) during the Rāshṭrakūṭa period.

It refers to a certain Āyichavarmarasa as bhōgapati and a chief (name lost) of Māṭṭara (i.e., Māṭūra) family. This is the earliest known reference to Māṭūra family. Satyaḷge seventy and Kuḷuga-gāmuṇḍa of the Chikkamba family are mentioned. It seems to register a gift of land made to a certain Vṛishabhaṇandi-Gorava. The record is broken on both the sides.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sti śrī pṛthuvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja
pṛthuvīrājyaṁgeye śakanṛpakālātītasaṁ
ttaneya sarvvajideṁba varṣaṁ pravarttise vanavāsi
ḷe Āyicavarmmarasar bhōgapatiyāge svasti ki
puravarēśvaraṁ māṭṭaravaṁśōdhbavaṁ brahmakṣatriyaṁ
patiyāge śrīmat cikkaṁbara kuḷugagāmuṇḍana
gāmuṇḍaṁ satyaḷgeEḻpattaṟū nāḻgāmuṇḍa va
Irmmattarnnīrmmaṇṇaṁ Uḷidalliyuṁ Ellā Ūrggaḷoḷaṁ Irmmatta rkkeyya
ruṁ siḍiyamāra dēvigeṟeya modala tōṇṭamumaṁ vṛṣabhaṇandigora varge vi
ṭṭa vidyādānamaṁ vṛṣabhaṇandigoravara kadirmmiḍiya Uttamaguḍiya
diṁbarsakkiyāge kaḷanūrggaṇada tiraḷaṇandigoravarge kālgaḻci The letter da is written below the line.
yeṁbūruṁ ballahagoḍaṁgeyya Oḷage teṁka siḍiyanūra ba
darigoḷaṁ baḍaga beṭṭe paḍuva siḍiyanūra pola mēṟe
yuṁ mēreyuṁ mādēvara mundaṇa pāḷnālmattar Endeya bāviyomma
ttara tōṇṭaṁ maneya nēsaṇaṁ mūḍa puṇuse paḍuva keṟe teṁka keyye baḍaga keṟe
riya mēgaṇa mūṟamamaḻvuṇise Ivu guḍḍegaḷ suḷḷara Eṟeyapanuṁ kurara siriguḍiyanuṁ muttūra raṇa
kiyuṁ maḻtavūra tippeyuṁ Inibaruṁ sakki basadiya pala mūṟu bhāgaṁ [Alli] khaṇḍasbhuṭitakkaṁ Abhyāgatarggaṁ muṁdā
ḍuvōrggaṁ . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmi stasya tasya ta
dā phalaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harētyavanīmimāṁ ṣaṣṭiṁ varṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi[ḥ .]
sya viṣaṁ ghōraṁ na viṣaṁ viṣamucyatē viṣamēkabhavaṁ hanti dēvasvaṁ putra pautrikaṁ . satyatyāgābhi
mānōnnatava gāryyaṁgaḷendu nityōdyōgaṁge nōḍittinitu mavikalaṁ mey
guṇaṁgaḷ nitāntaṁ pratyakṣaṁ lōkarūḍhaṁ sale tanagivu tāṁ nityamammā ṭṭiḻda
tyantaṁ kṣētramāguttamā pōpaṁ keṟege bittuvaṭṭa cikkaṁbaro
kka
ti
Digital edition of SII 18.38 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
